projects.name: VL-ADK
projects.description: Mimicks the functionality of a generalized VLA robotics model using a fleet of Google ADK agents, powered by NVIDIA Nemotron. Allows dynamic prompting of a cost-effective NVIDIA Jetson Orin-powered robot, achieving intelligent movement and spatial reasoning, even with extremely limited sensing capabilities.

projects.name: Lootcode
prize: Featured in Linux Magazine's OSS Section, August 2024
projects.description: A fantasy themed, highly-interactive Data Structures and Algorithms study suite. Features not only dozens of coding problems to solve, but also heavy gamification, with lore and loot to collect as you progress on your journey.

projects.name: CodeJoust
projects.description: CodeJoust is a competitive programming platform that allows you to duel your friends from over hundreds of available problems, while also featuring matchmaking and an in-depth ranking system, motivating you to play just one more round. CodeJoust also features numerous abilities that help add extra strategy and stand it apart from the competition.

projects.name: Voiceboard
prize: 1st Place Google's Hack for Social Good Challenge at Shellhacks 2024
projects.description: Voiceboard utilizes Google Gemini to make whiteboarding "accessible for all" by converting your speech to detailed, context-aware diagrams.

projects.name: AirJam
projects.description: AirJam allows you to explore music without ever having to pick up an instrument; using OpenCV, we convert your hand movements to notes on dozens of instruments, with controls to set tempos and swap instrument groups on the fly, without ever having to pick up a guitar.
